gt_sql: SELECT T2.DisplayName FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id GROUP BY T2.DisplayName ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Id) DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN badges b ON u.Id = b.UserId
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
ORDER BY COUNT(b.Id) DESC
LIMIT 1
question: What is the display name of the user who has obtained the most number of badges?
